title: 食いしん坊は伊達じゃない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Inari One are eating together
during lunch break.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You leveled that heaping plate in no time flat.
Seems your appetite's as impressive as ever!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, enough with the flattery... I was just thinking
about having some curry as my next course.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It wasn't a compliment, ya idiot... Wait, you're gonna eat even more?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Isn't your trainer gonna get mad at ya for eating
all that? There's a race just around the corner—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... You don't think I eat too much, do
you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Maybe I really do eat too much...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yep, you gotta keep a nice balance!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I guess you're right. One last plate, then I'll call it
a day.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Didja not hear what I just said?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'd never be able to run on an empty
stomach!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've gotta eat my fill so I can smash this next race!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I think I get why Oguri chose you as her trainer
now...
